name: Brahan Spring Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Brahan Spring Recreation Center in Huntsville, AL! There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court can be reserved. The court is free.

name: Buckhorn Youth Athletic Association
description: Come play pickleball at Buckhorn Youth Athletic Association in Huntsville, AL! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: California Street Park
description: California Street Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Huntsville, AL. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Challenger Gymnasium
description: School gymnasium so schedule is based on competing priorities and can change daily. Best to check schedule on Huntsville Pickleball Club page.

name: Dr. Richard Showers, Sr.
description: Come play pickleball at Dr. Richard Showers, Sr. in Huntsville, AL! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to water and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Dr. Robert Shurney Legacy Center
description: Come play pickleball at Dr. Robert Shurney Legacy Center in Huntsville, AL! There are 6 hard and wood courts. 3 are indoors and 3 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Dublin Park
description: Come play pickleball at Dublin Park in Madison, AL! There are 16 outdoor hard courts. 4 courts are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. An additional 12 courts can be set up from six pickleball-lined tennis courts. The facility has 4 sturdy rolling outdoor nets that can be used on 2 of the tennis courts, and portable nets available on the other courts. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights and the courts are free.

name: Hogan Family YMCA
description: Hogan Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Madison, AL. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.
open_play_schedule:
Due to the summer schedule, the courts are no longer available. 

Held in the gym, the previous schedule was Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 10:30 to 12:30.
fees: Members only — Members Only, Guest Pass Also Available 3x a year at $15 individual
